findings.title: Defensive throws after narrowing could be unreachable
findings.detail: The `switch (contract.next_action)` cases for `await_user` and `terminal` are unreachable after the preceding terminal/gated guards consumed those states. The throws are harmless and defensive, but a comment noting they are belt-and-suspenders (for when flags lie) would aid future readers. No functional change needed.

findings.title: readRun does not validate history entry shape
findings.detail: `readRun` checks `Array.isArray(run.history)` but does not validate each entry has `to`/`timestamp` strings. `currentEntryAt` accesses `entry.to` and `entry.timestamp` without runtime checks. If a malformed history entry slips through, the router would silently skip or return undefined rather than throwing `RunReadError`. Consider validating entry shape in `readRun`, or narrowing in `currentEntryAt`. Not a blocker since this module operates behind trusted stores.
